playbook.intent: Engineer kicks off a small SFT / LoRA / DPO job (OpenAI or local), monitors training, runs holdout eval, decides keep or trash.
playbook.scope: Engineer kicks off a small SFT / LoRA / DPO job (OpenAI or local), monitors training, runs holdout eval, decides keep or trash.

success-criteria.criterion: One-line verdict posted to team channel/dashboard for this cycle
Act-now items either executed and verified, or explicitly handed off
Cadence ledger updated so the next run starts in under 5 minutes
No silent-drop: every anomaly resolved or queued with an owner

stage.name: Pre-flight
stage.intent: Confirm inputs, dashboards, access, and yesterday's open items.

tasks.task: Verify required dashboards/logs are reachable and current
Re-open yesterday's deferred items list
Set a hard time-box for this run

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every required surface is green; otherwise resolve the access/data gap first.

stage.name: Scan
stage.intent: Read the surface in one pass; capture anomalies without acting.

tasks.task: Walk through every required panel/chart/feed once
Log anomalies and outliers in a single scratchpad
Do not act on anything yet

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the scan is complete; if scan reveals an incident, branch to incident response.

stage.name: Reproduce
stage.intent: Reproduce the worst anomaly locally before acting.

tasks.task: Pull a minimal repro from production data
Confirm the anomaly is real, not a dashboard artifact
Capture the repro for the eval set or test suite

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the anomaly is confirmed real; if dashboard artifact, fix the dashboard.

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: Score and bucket anomalies into act-now / investigate / ignore.

tasks.task: Score each anomaly by severity and reversibility
Bucket into act-now / investigate / ignore
Pick at most 1-3 act-now items for this cycle

stage.decision-gate: Advance with no more than 1-3 act-now items; if more, raise the bar.

stage.name: Verify
stage.intent: Verify each act-now item landed and didn't regress neighbours.

tasks.task: Run targeted check on the act-now item
Run the regression sniff-test on adjacent surfaces
Roll back any item that regressed something else

stage.decision-gate: Advance only on clean verification; rollback otherwise.

stage.name: Act
stage.intent: Execute the chosen act-now items end-to-end.

tasks.task: Execute each act-now item with an explicit owner and rollback plan
Capture before/after evidence
Hand off anything that exceeds the time-box

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every act-now item is either done or explicitly handed off; never silent-drop.

stage.name: Close
stage.intent: Post the one-line verdict, queue follow-ups, and end the loop.

tasks.task: Post a one-line verdict to the team channel/dashboard
Queue follow-ups in the appropriate backlog
Update the cadence ledger so future runs see the trend

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written verdict; no "see how it goes".

stage.name: Document
stage.intent: Promote learnings into runbook, eval set, or rule.

tasks.task: Update runbook for the failure mode
Add the failing example to the eval set
Open a rule/lint PR if the pattern is systemic

stage.decision-gate: Advance once learnings live outside this scratchpad.

stage.name: Cadence handoff
stage.intent: Hand state to the next cycle so it starts faster.

tasks.task: Pin open items to tomorrow's pre-flight
Update on-call notes if any
Close this run's loop with a timestamp

stage.decision-gate: Required: next run can start in <5 min; if not, the handoff is broken.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content fine-tune-job-kickoff-monitor --format md, agent: faion get-content fine-tune-job-kickoff-monitor --format context, json: faion get-content fine-tune-job-kickoff-monitor --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 playbook from F-059-063 chunk-09.}]
